description: Create a two-column content slide on China luxury market outlook with headline and two side-by-side quote panels summarizing brand landscape dynamism and cautious optimism.

header.headline: Brand landscape is becoming more dynamic; cautiously optimistic outlook on China luxury market

left.title: Strong growth in 2010 & majority of 2011; with a more dynamic and active brand landscape

items.text: "2010 was a recovery year for luxury watch market with an unprecedented high growth."
"With such a fast growing and dynamic market, brands are doing everything they can to ride the growth and strengthen their presence in China."

right.title: Overall business environment remains positive with a few uncertainties

items.text: "We are still having quite good growth during Q4 of 2011, just not as spectacular as the first 3 quarters...We are cautiously optimistic about 2012."
"Overall we are quite positive and confident about the China market; but there are things happening that we don't have enough visibility."

footer.source: This information is confidential and was prepared by Bain & Company solely for the use of our client; it is not to be relied on by any 3rd party without Bain's prior written consent. 2011 Bain China Luxury Market Study_Media release_vf 13
